news.summary: Real Madrid beat relegation-threatened Alaves 2-1 in La Liga to close the gap with leaders Barcelona to six points.

news.headline: Trump Is Said to Be in Talks to Send Afghans Who Aided U.S. Forces to Congo
news.summary: A U.S. aid worker said that the Afghans, who were evacuated to Qatar, would face a choice between moving to the Democratic Republic of Congo and living under the Taliban.
